description_long: This object is a cluster of four bananas joined at the stem, with each banana displaying a slightly curved, elongated form. The peels are predominantly yellow with some brown and black discoloration, especially near the tips and along the edges, indicating surface blemishes and aging. The stem is thick, dark, and somewhat shriveled, with a rough, fibrous texture. The bananas' surfaces are semi-glossy, showing subtle reflections and a slightly waxy appearance. The cluster sits as a single unit, with the bananas closely packed and their sides pressed together, forming a compact group. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on any of the bananas.
description: A cluster of four yellow bananas with brown and black blemishes, joined at a thick, dark stem. The bananas are slightly curved and closely packed together, showing signs of surface aging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cluster of four bananas, with the yellow peels and brown-black blemishes most visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the thick, dark stem and the tips of the bananas, with more pronounced black discoloration at the ends.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the curvature of the bananas and the compact arrangement, with the peels' surface texture visible.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the stem and the side of the foremost banana, showing the transition from yellow to brown at the peel's base.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels show moderate blemishing and dark spots, especially near the tips and edges, with some areas appearing slightly shriveled. There are no visible tears or splits, but the surface texture is uneven and aged.
